excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap replaces RoPE
a claim that content-key auxiliary success is equivalent to solving the original phase-cued retrieval gate
a claim that auxiliary data transfer is positional-method promotion evidence by itself
supported: A no-credential auxiliary-training transfer audit for the two-block learned pointer-generator path.
Evidence about whether Stage67 visible content-key training helps the original Stage10 held-out retrieval rows.

decision.claim_boundary: Content-key auxiliary training preserves capacity but does not transfer to original held-out retrieval rows.

model.row_policy: train each original Stage10 task with same-seed original train rows plus content-key auxiliary train rows; validate/test only on unchanged original rows
model.trained_parameters: token embeddings, two q/k/v/o attention blocks, vocab output projection, positional scale, copy/vocab gate
model.value_output_mode: learned mixture of vocab softmax and copied prefix-token mass

source_rows: stage10 original rows plus stage67 content-key auxiliary train rows
